description: Hardcoded cloud-VLM page routing for the EvidenceOpsDemo corpus ZIP. Pages not listed here use Docling/text/OCR extraction only. Includes Public Reference Corpus and Demo Synthetic Corpus routing.

audit and monitoring/cms_internal_monito.reason: Page 1 has prominent embedded visual/front matter; page 10 has a large embedded visual; pages 11-12 are dense numeric/table-style checklist pages where visual structure helps retrieval.

audit and monitoring/osha_safety_and_hea.reason: Text/form-like pages are extractable enough with Docling; avoid cloud VLM spend.

contracts and procurement/palm_beach_cou.reason: Single-page checklist with dense table/form structure; cloud VLM helps preserve visual row/field meaning.

contracts and procurement/world_bank_spd.reason: Very long text-first procurement document. Only the visual cover/front matter is routed to cloud VLM; the remaining 200 pages are handled by Docling/text extraction to save credits.

human resources/CV_Francis_Taylor.pdf.reason: Text-based CV; Docling extraction is sufficient and avoids unnecessary cloud VLM use.

human resources/jd_scientist_ii_preclini.reason: Text-based job description; Docling extraction is sufficient.

incident and action tracking/cbiac-septe.reason: Text-based meeting summary/action items; Docling extraction is sufficient.

incident and action tracking/lanl_subcon.reason: Pages 1 and 9 contain large embedded visual/scanned regions; page 2 is a visually structured form/table page.

incident and action tracking/osha_near_m.reason: Simple one-page form with extractable text; Docling extraction is enough.

policy and governance/cornell_retention_.reason: Text-first policy document; detected visual content is not important enough to spend cloud VLM credits.

policy and governance/grambling_third_pa.reason: Short text-first policy document; Docling extraction is sufficient.

policy and governance/northeastern_suppl.reason: Short text-first code of conduct; Docling extraction is sufficient.

policy and governance/northwestern_infor.reason: Short text-first security policy; Docling extraction is sufficient.

reference frameworks/nih_ibc_meeting_min.reason: Template/form text is extractable; skip cloud VLM to save credits.

reference frameworks/nist_csf_2_0.pdf.reason: Selected pages contain cover/figure/diagram imagery that benefits from visual description. Other pages are text-first and use Docling only.

reference frameworks/nist_csf_v1_1.pdf.reason: Selected pages contain framework diagrams/figures. Remaining pages are text-first and use Docling only.

technical/Technical Architecture Brief.p.reason: Pages 1-11 are text-first and should use Docling/text extraction only. Pages 12-15 are embedded image-only appendix captures; OCR gets rough text, but cloud VLM is worth using to preserve diagram/whiteboard/checklist meaning for retrieval.
